description: The SpawnOrDestroy component is part of the Undo system, and handles spawning and destruction of objects in the Undo system.

fields.Target: The target worker to use when executing.
fields.TargetParent: The parent of this object to restore it to.
fields._onRestored: The sync delegate with this compoonent's worker passed as an object to trigger when the object is restored.
fields._preserveAssets: Whether the destruction should preserve assets like meshes.
fields._sendDestroyingEvents: Whether to send destruction events when destroying.
fields._savedObject: The URI of the saved object.
fields._isComponent: Whether this is in component form or internal to the engine.
fields._referenceTable: The place to store destroyed object data in order to restore the object later.
fields._isSaving: Whether this component is saving object data.
fields._performed: Whether this component is finished executing it's function.
